subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him whose letter hath come before his Lord, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting, and We make mention of him through this Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن حضر کتابه امام وجه ربه المهیمن القیوم و نذکره بهذا اللوح
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
